---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve ARIA
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. ...
2. ...

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened (include logs, tracebacks, or screenshots if possible).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.9]
- Deployed via: [Docker Compose / local / Kubernetes]
- ARIA version / commit: [e.g. `git rev-parse --short HEAD`]
